Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class ScheduleTransfers

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.ScheduleTransfers

  • Method Details

    • listScheduleSummaries

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesRequestBuilder listScheduleSummaries()
      List Schedule Summaries Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request
      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listScheduleSummariesDirect

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesResponse listScheduleSummariesDirect() throws Exception
      List Schedule Summaries Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listScheduleSummaries

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesResponse listScheduleSummaries(Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken) throws Exception
      List Schedule Summaries Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request
      Specified by:
      listScheduleSummaries in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallTransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummaries
      Parameters:
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `account` `mechanism` `direction` `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Specified by:
      createAchDepositSchedule in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAchDepositSchedulesCreateAchDepositSchedule
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositScheduleCreate - A deposit transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

      public AchDepositSchedulesListAchDepositSchedulesResponse listAchDepositSchedules(String accountId, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken) throws Exception
      List ACH Deposit Schedules Return a list of ACH deposit schedules for the specified account and filter params
      Specified by:
      listAchDepositSchedules in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAchDepositSchedulesListAchDepositSchedules
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      The response from the API call

      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateAchDepositSchedule

      public AchDepositSchedulesUpdateAchDepositScheduleResponse updateAchDepositSchedule(String accountId, String achDepositScheduleId, Optional<String> updateMask, AchDepositScheduleUpdate achDepositScheduleUpdate) throws Exception
      Update ACH Deposit Schedules Updates the amount of an ACH deposit transfer schedule
      Specified by:
      updateAchDepositSchedule in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallAchDepositSchedulesUpdateAchDepositSchedule
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositScheduleId - The achDepositSchedule id.
      updateMask - A field mask representing the update. Note: only the 'schedule_details.amount' field of a schedule is currently updatable
      achDepositScheduleUpdate - A deposit transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateWireWithdrawalSchedule

      Update Wire Withdrawal Schedule Updates the amount of a Wire withdrawal transfer schedule
      Specified by:
      updateWireWithdrawalSchedule in interface SDKMethodInterfaces.MethodCallWireWithdrawalSchedulesUpdateWireWithdrawalSchedule
      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      wireWithdrawalScheduleId - The wireWithdrawalSchedule id.
      updateMask - A field mask representing the update. Note: only the 'schedule_details.amount' field of a schedule is currently updatable
      wireWithdrawalScheduleUpdate - A withdrawal transfer schedule using the Wire mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
